info.title: Timely.ai API
info.description: Timely.ai REST API for AI-powered customer service automation. Manage agents, conversations, contacts, and integrations.

tags.name: System
tags.description: Health check and API key introspection

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: AI agents — creation, configuration, and management

tags.name: Chats
tags.description: Active chat operations and human handoff

tags.name: MCP
tags.description: Model Context Protocol — servers and tools

get.description: Checks whether the API is running. Does not require authentication.
Returns information about the API key, including scopes and permissions.
Returns a paginated list of AI agents.

post.description: Creates a new AI agent.

get.description: Returns details of a specific agent.

post.description: Activates an agent to receive conversations.
Temporarily deactivates an agent.

get.description: Returns advanced settings for an agent.

put.description: Updates advanced settings for an agent.

get.description: Returns the webhook configuration for an agent.

put.description: Updates the webhook configuration for an agent.

post.description: Starts a new conversation with the agent via API.
Injects additional context for the agent's next response.

get.description: Returns the credit balance for an agent.
Returns the history of behavior changes for an agent.
Returns trainings associated with the agent.

post.description: Adds a new training to the agent's knowledge base.

delete.description: Removes a training from the knowledge base.

get.description: Returns a list of communication channels.

post.description: Creates a new communication channel.

get.description: Returns channel-specific settings.
Returns the QR code for WhatsApp connection.

post.description: Starts a new conversation through the channel.

get.description: Returns links for embedding the widget on a website.

put.description: Updates the widget's appearance and behavior.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of contacts.

post.description: Creates a new contact.

get.description: Returns details of a contact.
Returns a paginated list of conversations.
Returns details of a conversation.
Returns messages from a conversation.

post.description: Sends a message in the conversation.

delete.description: Removes all messages from a conversation.

put.description: Edits the content of a message.

post.description: Pauses the AI agent and transfers to human support.
Resumes AI agent control of the conversation.

get.description: Returns a list of custom fields.

post.description: Creates a new custom field.

delete.description: Removes a chat and all its messages.
Removes all messages from a chat.

put.description: Edits the content of a message.

post.description: Pauses the AI agent and starts human support.
Resumes AI agent control.

get.description: Returns details of a specific message.

post.description: Adds a new MCP server to the agent.
Establishes a connection with an MCP server.

get.description: Lists tools available on the agent's MCP servers.

put.description: Activates an MCP tool for use by the agent.

post.description: Syncs tools from all of the agent's MCP servers.

delete.description: Removes an MCP server from the agent.

get.description: Returns a list of configured webhooks.

post.description: Creates a new webhook to receive events.

get.description: Returns details of a webhook.

post.description: Sends a test event to the webhook.

get.description: Returns the delivery history for a webhook.

ApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key obtained from the dashboard
